title: WunderGraph Cosmo Feature Flag
description: A Feature Flag enables gradual rollout of feature subgraphs to federated graphs in the WunderGraph Cosmo platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the feature flag.

name.description: The name of the feature flag.

namespace.description: The namespace the feature flag belongs to.

isEnabled.description: Whether the feature flag is currently enabled.

createdAt.description: When the feature flag was created.

updatedAt.description: When the feature flag was last updated.
